title: Sword Age
description: Texture pack changing all sword textures!
body:
This texture pack is changing all swords textures to newer one, adding more realism to them or even making them slighty smaller!! If vanilla textures of swords are insufficient, I would highly recommend this texture pack!
![New swords compared to old swords](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0c90b3544c79c29052964dcf1cf67ceef2b93e5f.png)
